title: Burning Topic Series Structure Plan
purpose: Define continuity format for evolving public/world topics through the Friday World Lens lane without selecting topics, enabling live feeds, scraping, API calls, article generation, publication or backend activation.

continuity_frames.purpose: Define the topic, why it matters now, what is known, and what is not yet established.
Trace the relevant background, chronology and institutional/public context.
Explain institutions, groups, technologies, policies, markets or social forces involved.
Separate verified facts, credible reporting, official records, expert interpretation and open questions.
Explain impact on citizens, systems, economy, environment, governance, culture or everyday life.
Compare with another country, sector, historical case, policy model or institutional response.
Record disputed claims, misinformation risks, unknowns, limitations and editorial cautions.
Describe possible future pathways without pretending prediction certainty.
Explain who can act, what mechanisms exist, and what accountability questions matter.
Connect the issue to human consequences, values, equity, trust and social meaning.
Help the reader consolidate the moving issue and understand what to watch next.
Close, extend, archive or convert the topic into a future deep-read/learning series candidate.

burning_archetypes.label: AI Regulation and Society
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; AG23G First Light bridge allowed only with source verification
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Regulatory and technology claims require official, institutional or credible expert/editorial sources.

burning_archetypes.label: Climate, Water Stress and Public Systems
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; source and uncertainty gates mandatory
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Climate, water and public-system claims require careful separation of observed data, projections and interpretation.

burning_archetypes.label: Global Conflict and Geopolitical Shifts
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; high-sensitivity risk review required
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Conflict topics require high factual caution, no propaganda amplification and no unsupported breaking-news claims.

burning_archetypes.label: Sports Governance and Society
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Sporting, institutional and public-facing claims require verified event records and credible reporting.

burning_archetypes.label: Public Health Alert and System Response
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above; health safety framing mandatory
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Health-related topics must not provide diagnosis/treatment advice and must rely on official or credible medical/public health sources.

burning_archetypes.label: Media, Society and Public Trust
burning_archetypes.selection_gate: AG24B strong_series_candidate with score 25 or above
burning_archetypes.source_caution: Media/society claims require avoiding overgeneralisation and distinguishing evidence from interpretation.

supabase_reminder: Hybrid staged path remains selected: static/GitHub-controlled go-live first; Supabase/Auth/backend later only after explicit review and approval.
